---
title: "Project Proposal"
author: "Max Niu & Hyeonsu An"
format: pdf
execute: 
  warning: false
  message: false
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| label: load-pkg-data
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
# add other packages as needed

events <- read_csv("data/global_climate_events_economic_impact_2020_2025.csv")
```

## Introduction

...

## Data description

...

## Data processing

...

## Analysis approach

...

## Data dictionary

The data dictionary can be found [here](ADD%20LINK!!!) \[Update the link and remove this note!\]

## AI Disclosure
